mapper.select: SELECT BRAND_NO, BRAND_NM, BRAND_IMG_URL, USE_YN FROM PR_BRAND_BASE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BRAND_NM
SELECT DLV_POLICY_NO, DLV_POLICY_NM, DLV_TP_CD, DLV_AMT, FREE_COND_AMT, RTN_DLV_AMT, USE_YN FROM PR_DLV_POLICY WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DLV_POLICY_NM
SELECT OPT_GRP_CD, OPT_GRP_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN FROM PR_OPT_GRP WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
SELECT OPT_GRP_CD, OPT_ITM_CD, OPT_ITM_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN FROM PR_OPT_ITM WHERE OPT_GRP_CD = #{optGrpCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PR_GOODS_IMG (GOODS_NO, IMG_SEQ, IMG_URL, SORT_ORD, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{goodsNo}, #{imgSeq}, #{imgUrl}, #{sortOrd}, #{regId}, #{modId})
INSERT INTO PR_GOODS_OPT (GOODS_NO, OPT_GRP_CD, SORT_ORD, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{goodsNo}, #{optGrpCd}, #{sortOrd}, #{regId}, #{modId})
